summary: Iteration 22 testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: 1) Admin full-width layout (1696px main content width), 2) Admin player profile view with personal/team/parent info cards and edit mode, 3) Public academy group pages with tabs (Ρόστερ/Πρόγραμμα/Γκαλερί). All existing admin flows (dashboard, news, messages) still working.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing U12 academy group with 4 players for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested 3 new features: 1) Admin full-width layout - main content area is now 1696px wide (no max-w-6xl constraint), sidebar is w-56 (224px). 2) Admin player profile view - clicking player name in any roster table (PlayersTab, TeamsTab, EnhancedAcademyTab) opens AdminPlayerProfile component with view/edit modes. Profile shows 3 info cards: personal info, team info, parent info (for academy players). Edit mode has save/cancel buttons. 3) Public academy group pages - /academy page shows clickable group cards with 'Δες περισσότερα' links. Clicking navigates to /academy/:groupId which shows hero with breadcrumb, 3 tabs (Ρόστερ/Πρόγραμμα/Γκαλερί), player cards linking to /player/:id. Backend APIs: GET /api/academy-groups/{id}, GET /api/academy-groups/{id}/players, GET /api/academy-groups/{id}/fixtures, GET /api/gallery?academy_group_id={id} all working.

admin_full_width_layout.dashboard_cards: PASS - Cards use full width of main content area

admin_player_profile_view.players_tab_click: PASS - Clicking player name opens AdminPlayerProfile
admin_player_profile_view.teams_tab_click: PASS - Clicking player row in team roster opens AdminPlayerProfile
admin_player_profile_view.academy_tab_click: PASS - Clicking player row in academy roster opens AdminPlayerProfile

profile_view_mode.personal_info_card: PASS - Shows name, number, position, nationality, DOB, age, height, weight, foot
profile_view_mode.team_info_card: PASS - Shows team type, academy group (for academy players)
profile_view_mode.parent_info_card: PASS - Shows parent name, phone, email (for academy players)

profile_edit_mode.edit_button: PASS - Επεξεργασία button opens edit form

profile_edit_mode.parent_fields: PASS - Shows parent name/phone/email fields for academy players
profile_edit_mode.save_button: PASS - Αποθήκευση button saves changes via API
profile_edit_mode.cancel_button: PASS - Ακύρωση button cancels edit mode

admin_player_profile_view.back_button: PASS - Πίσω στη λίστα returns to roster list

public_academy_group_pages.academy_page_cards: PASS - Group cards are clickable links to /academy/:groupId
public_academy_group_pages.hero_section: PASS - Shows group name, age range, coach, schedule, season

tabs.roster_tab: PASS - Ρόστερ tab shows player cards
